task_summary: Install four-agent engineering workflow + test harness (PR #44)
novel_insight: Business thresholds (60/70/80/90/30/3) and persona assignment were inlined inside Assessment.tsx — extracted to src/domain/. Establishes the pattern that any future page touch should also extract its inline rules.

`as Record<string, unknown>` casts on .insert() systematically fail TS2769 because Supabase's typed Insert overload rejects the cast. Tables not in generated types.ts (module_quiz_attempts, feedback) cause TS2589 deep recursion on .select. Lucide icons reject `title` prop. Multi-line method chains break // @ts-expect-error line targeting — the directive must be on the line immediately before the error site.

task_summary: Enable coverage ratchet — set thresholds to measured baseline (PR #47)
novel_insight: Stacked PRs (PR #47 based on PR #44's branch) need their base retargeted to staging once the parent merges, otherwise the diff displays incorrectly. `gh pr edit <num> --base staging` is the fix. Worth automating in /pr or a postmerge hook.

task_summary: Build the postmortem loop itself (PR #49) + record feature-branch-discipline rule
novel_insight: When the user says 'remember this' mid-implementation, save the auto-memory file BEFORE continuing the in-flight work — otherwise the rule is at risk of being lost if the session is interrupted. Also: gh pr list --author @me filter doesn't match cross-account commits; drop the filter to see all open PRs.

task_summary: Migrate observation Supabase calls to backend API (PR #140) + fix production outage caused by wrong code deployed to wrong Railway service
novel_insight: CRITICAL: `railway up` uploads from CWD, not from the path argument. Running `railway up --service coaching-content-api /path/to/coaching-api` from repo root uploads the REPO ROOT (with package.json) to the API service, replacing the Python API with the React frontend. The Railway service has no memory of what it should be — any `railway up` overwrites it completely. ALWAYS verify CWD matches the service type before deploying. Second lesson: frontend and API reading from different databases (Supabase vs Railway Postgres) causes phantom data — deletes appear to work but data reappears on refresh because list reads from a different DB than delete writes to.

task_summary: Build Punjab Smart Schedule tab (HOTS UX, offline-first, stagnation flags) + merge ICT and Punjab schedulers into single /observation-scheduler page (PR #141)
novel_insight: Three independent fix patterns converged in one session: (1) hooks calling supabase.from() directly bypassed the src/data/ contract — the pr-reviewer caught it because rule 4 of the decision matrix fires on src/hooks/**; (2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING in a seed script is silently ineffective if the table has no UNIQUE constraint — add the constraint to the migration first, then use ON CONFLICT (...) DO UPDATE SET in the seed; (3) staging-merge lint failures from the merged branch are the PR author's responsibility to fix before the PR is reviewed — CI runs on the merged state, not just the feature branch.
